channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Life for Britons is much harder than it used to be – and Blair has ignored that, says Burnham
item.description: Life for Britons is much harder than it used to be – and Blair has ignored that, says Burnham

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Much of what Blair said in essay criticising Labour was wrong, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: Much of what Blair said in essay criticising Labour was wrong, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Blair is wrong about my government, Starmer says, as he hits back over Labour criticism
item.description: Blair is wrong about my government, Starmer says, as he hits back over Labour criticism

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Reversing minimum wage changes is no ‘easy solution’ to end Britain’s Neet crisis, Milburn warns
item.description: Reversing minimum wage changes is no ‘easy solution’ to end Britain’s Neet crisis, Milburn warns

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer defends policy decisions as he hits back at Blair
item.description: Starmer defends policy decisions as he hits back at Blair

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
The Guardian: UK minister visits Australia for ‘lessons’ ahead of expected British social media crackdown - The Guardian
item.description: UK minister visits Australia for ‘lessons’ ahead of expected British social media crackdown - The Guardian

item.title: FT UK Politics: Ministers must make fresh push for welfare reform says UK government adviser
item.description: Ministers must make fresh push for welfare reform says UK government adviser

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham steps back from past calls to end immigration benefits restriction
item.description: Burnham steps back from past calls to end immigration benefits restriction
